personalInfo.name: Shehab Ehab Hamdy
personalInfo.title: Banking Operations Specialist | I-Score & CBE Regulatory Reporting Expert
personalInfo.location: El Nozha El Gedida, Cairo, Egypt

careerObjective: To leverage specialized expertise in banking operations, I-Score systems, and Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) regulatory reporting, combined with advanced skills in process automation and artificial intelligence, to engineer innovative fintech solutions. Aiming to drive operational efficiency, data integrity, and compliance excellence in a high-impact CCR, Credit Risk, or Regulatory Reporting role.
professionalSummary: Results-driven Banking Professional specializing in I-Score operations, credit data validation, and Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) regulatory reporting. Proven track record of enhancing operational efficiency through workflow automation, process optimization, and custom software tools. Experienced in credit risk support, compliance controls, and risk reporting, seeking to leverage technical and banking expertise to streamline financial operations.
aboutMe: I am a banking operations and compliance specialist dedicated to ensuring rigorous adherence to Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) regulations while driving operational excellence. My expertise lies at the intersection of banking compliance, credit data integrity, and digital transformation. I specialize in designing and implementing process automation tools and AI-driven solutions that eliminate manual redundancies, minimize operational risks, and significantly improve data quality and reporting speed.

bulletPoints: Manage end-to-end daily I-Score reporting and Credit Bureau submissions, maintaining 100% data integrity and regulatory compliance.
Perform credit data validation and reconciliation of customer portfolios to mitigate operational and credit risk.
Prepare and execute Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) regulatory notifications and credit reports.
Coordinate cross-functionally with Risk, Compliance, and Operations teams to align reporting processes.
Optimized reporting workflows, successfully reducing processing turnaround times by 80%.
Orchestrated daily warehouse logistics and production operations to ensure optimal supply chain flow.
Managed employee scheduling, shift coordination, and supervised floor operations to meet daily output targets.
Supervised daily attendance tracking systems and maintained accurate workforce logs.
Prepared and audited time-tracking datasets for integration with payroll processing, ensuring administrative precision.

projects.title: I-Score Data Automation Tool
projects.subtitle: Excel-to-Text DLT Format Converter
projects.description: Designed and developed an automated data conversion tool that transforms complex Excel datasets into text files fully compliant with the I-Score DLT file specification. Eliminated human entry errors and streamlined regulatory submission packaging.
projects.achievement: Reduced file processing time by 98.3% (from 3 hours down to 3 minutes) while establishing complete data validation checks.

projects.title: I-Score Technical Guide Optimization
projects.subtitle: Knowledge Management & Training Manual
projects.description: Created a simplified, high-utility adaptation of the official I-Score technical file specification guide to streamline team knowledge transfer.
projects.achievement: Adopted as the primary training and quick-reference manual for onboarding new banking operations staff.

projects.title: AI Operations Assistant
projects.subtitle: Banking & I-Score Knowledge Copilot
projects.description: Designed and engineered an AI-powered conversational assistant to provide instant, context-aware answers regarding banking regulations, I-Score file specifications, and internal operational procedures.
projects.achievement: Currently in testing phases; demonstrates significant potential to minimize internal inquiry resolution delays.

services.title: Banking Process Automation
services.description: Developing custom tools and scripts to convert slow, repetitive manual worksheets into fast, secure, automated workflows.

services.title: Regulatory Reporting Support
services.description: Ensuring seamless compliance, formatting, and submission protocols for I-Score and CBE regulatory guidelines.

services.title: Credit Data Validation & Reconciliation
services.description: Executing systematic data audits and discrepancy resolutions to maintain absolute credit portfolio accuracy.

services.title: AI Solutions for Banking Operations
services.description: Deploying intelligent conversational interfaces to simplify access to complex guides, policies, and standard operating procedures.
